title: Portuguese Pudding Clear Crème Brûlée
description: A creamy, rich dessert with a hint of Portuguese flavors and a caramelized sugar crust.
instructions: Prepare the pudding mix according to the package instructions.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the honey and Portuguese until well combined.
Add the honey-Portuguese mixture to the pudding mix and stir until smooth.
Pour the pudding mixture into 4 ramekins or small baking dishes.
Place the ramekins in a large baking dish and add hot water to come halfway up the sides of the ramekins.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until set.
Remove the ramekins from the water bath and let cool to room temperature.
Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Just before serving, sprinkle a thin layer of sugar over the top of each ramekin.
Caramelize the sugar with a kitchen torch or under the broiler.
